_publications._publicationTitle: An inflammatory gene signature distinguishes neurofibroma Schwann cells and macrophages from cells in the normal peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: We sorted F4/80 + ;CD11b + macrophages in three independent experiments ( Fig. 1a ). We used the sorted cells to perform microarray experiments
details: Successfully performed cell sorting to isolate distinct populations of Schwann cells and macrophages from neurofibroma tissue for downstream gene expression analysis
